title: May 18–22 Weekly Market Report
report:
## Market Overview (May 18–22)

41 of 67 themes (61%) posted gains. Average theme change was +1.24%, a strong week driven by defense, semiconductor, and AI-related themes. The TOPIX rose 1.8% on the week.

---

## Top Rising Themes

### 🥇 1st: Defense & Aerospace (+8.1%)
Three consecutive weeks at the top. Kawasaki Heavy Industries (7012) won a destroyer contract. Government defense supplementary budget discussions advanced.

### 🥈 2nd: Semiconductor Equipment (+5.3%)
Lasertec (6920) reported Q3 results beating estimates. AI chip capex remains robust.

### 🥉 3rd: Cyber Security (+4.7%)
Japan's National Cyber Security Strategy revision under discussion, boosting NTT Data (9613) and Fujitsu (6702).

---
